meta.title: OpenMontage Multi-Industry Capability Registry
meta.generatedBy: build-registry.mjs (source-verified audit; no source presence assumed operational)
meta.scoreConvention: All *Score fields 0-100, higher=better, EXCEPT privacyRiskScore (0=safe,100=high risk). textTransformRisk: none|low|medium|high|n/a. stableOverlaySupport: native|compatible|incompatible|n/a.
meta.readinessNote: verified=true means proven operational (rendered/approved or PRODUCTION-stability QA). verified=false means source exists but operation is NOT proven; check dependencies/apiKeyRequired/gpuRequired before use.
meta.apiKeyNote: apiKeyRequired names the env var; null=zero-key. API tools check os.environ in get_status() (not via the env: dependency mechanism).
meta.toolCountNote: A direct re-grep of `class X(BaseTool)` finds 85 tool classes on disk; an earlier audit pass reported 86 (over-counted by one base/abstract). 85 is the verified figure used here.
meta.fiftyTwoNote: The promotional '~52 scenes' is NOT 52 distinct verified scenes. It is a non-authoritative sum of the OpenMontage core (~19 scene-like entries: 13 cut + 4 overlay + ~2-9 standalone comps) plus saas-pack version-fork files (templates ~10 + v51 ~10 + v511 ~4 + v512 ~9 ≈ 33). Version forks (V51/V511/V512), diagnostic roots, aliases and fallback routes are NOT counted as distinct scenes here.

items.name: TextCard
items.notes: Text rides a scale spring (L38-39) — animated-transform shimmer risk; keep short, prefer settle.

items.name: StatCard
items.notes: Stat in scale spring (L50).

items.name: CalloutBox
items.notes: Box wrapped in translateX+scale (L122).

items.name: ComparisonCard
items.notes: Left/right values in slide+scale springs (L193,L317).

items.name: HeroTitle
items.notes: Per-char translateY spring (L58); also usable as overlay.type hero_title.

items.name: TerminalScene
items.notes: Synthetic typed terminal; window has 0.97→1 settle scale only. Privacy-safe, zero capture.

items.name: ScreenshotScene
bestFor: overlay scripted UI on a real screenshot (cursor/click/type)
items.notes: Contain-fit backdrop + normalized overlays; no camera zoom on text. Privacy: screenshot must be scrubbed.

items.name: BarChart
items.notes: Bars grow; labels static — anti-shimmer safe.

items.name: LineChart
items.notes: Path draws; text static — safe.

items.name: PieChart
items.notes: Slices expand; legend static — safe.

items.name: KPIGrid
items.notes: Count-up via value interpolation, not transform-scale — safe.

items.name: ProgressBar
items.notes: Container scale settles immediately; short label.

items.name: AnimeScene
items.notes: Camera scale/translate on image layers only; no readable text on stage.

items.name: SectionTitle
items.notes: translateX spring on text (L53).

items.name: StatReveal
bestFor: corner stat badge over other content
items.notes: Stat in scale spring 0→1 (L61).

items.name: ProviderChip
bestFor: rotating 'generated with X' badge — AI media disclosure
items.notes: Generic; provider list via props, no hardcoded names. Use for media-truth AI labeling.

items.name: Explainer (data-driven engine)
bestFor: assembling cut/overlay timelines from edit_decisions JSON
items.notes: The core sequencer: dispatches 13 cut types + 4 overlays + narration/music. Driven by schemas/artifacts/edit_decisions.

items.name: TitledVideo
items.notes: Registered composition (Root.tsx:194).

items.name: CinematicRenderer
items.notes: Registered composition (Root.tsx:153). Pairs with cinematic pipeline.

items.name: TalkingHead
items.notes: Registered 1080x1920 (Root.tsx:178). Needs an avatar/lip-sync source asset.

items.name: CaptionOverlay / WordCaption
items.notes: Fixed layer; per-word spring. CaptionOverlayOnly composition (Root.tsx:256).

items.name: CollageBurst
bestFor: fast image collage bursts for social
items.notes: Registered 1080x1920 (Root.tsx:271).

items.name: LyricOverlay
items.notes: Registered 1080x1920 (Root.tsx:286).

items.name: EndTag
items.notes: Opacity-only text; underline width animates (deliberately shimmer-safe). Compositions EndTag/EndTagOverlay (Root.tsx:299,315).

items.name: ProductReveal
items.notes: productName per-char spring + image scale. Compositions ProductReveal/ProductRevealVertical (Root.tsx:224,240).

items.name: BrandSceneV51
items.notes: Master #1. Camera from props; text on overlay.

items.name: ProblemSceneV51
items.notes: Master #2. FloatingCards drift on stage (intentional); headline on overlay.

items.name: UploadSceneV512
items.notes: Master #3 + UploadFixed diag. Browser walkthrough lifted to overlay; cursor/dissolve/toast preserved.

items.name: InviteSceneV512
items.notes: Master #4 + InviteFixed diag. StatusFlowStable on overlay.

items.name: OtpSceneV512
items.notes: Master #5 + OtpFixed diag. Phone+OTP+badge on overlay.

items.name: SignSceneV511
items.notes: Master #6 (v5.1.1 fix). Phone on overlay; integer PDF scroll.

items.name: AuditSceneV512
items.notes: Master #7 + AuditFixed diag. AuditTrailStable on overlay.

items.name: ComplianceSceneV512
items.notes: Master #8 + ComplianceFixed diag. StableChip row on overlay. Used by both aes & compliance ids.

items.name: CtaSceneV51
items.notes: Master #9. CTAHero on overlay.

items.name: BrowserWindow
items.notes: Generic browser chrome host for UI demos.

items.name: PhoneMockup
items.notes: Generic phone frame; lift content to overlay for readable UI.

items.name: PDFViewer
items.notes: Generic document page host. Integer scroll for dense text.

items.name: ContractDocument
items.notes: ClawShow demo contract (anonymized personas). Reuse layout, replace content.

items.name: OTPInputStable
items.notes: Anti-shimmer OTP: opacity-only digits, integer cells, scale 1.

items.name: StatusFlowStable
items.notes: Anti-shimmer vertical stepper; spinner/pulse are intentional live-status motion.

items.name: AuditTrailStable
items.notes: Anti-shimmer audit log: opacity-only rows, static glow.

items.name: VerificationBadge
items.notes: Generic trust stamp; settles to static.

items.name: CTAHero
items.notes: Generic CTA hero with dominant button.

items.name: SignatureStroke
items.notes: Generic hand-signature draw (decorative, intentional).

items.name: Cursor
items.notes: Generic animated cursor for UI walkthroughs.

items.name: NotificationToast
items.notes: Generic toast/notification pop.

items.name: Timeline
items.notes: Generic horizontal/process timeline.

items.name: ContractsWorkspace
items.notes: SaaS workspace/list shell (semi-generic).

items.name: EmailFlow
items.notes: Generic email/inbox flow (not in current master — unverified in render).

items.name: AnimatedBackground
items.notes: Slow-breathe gradient bg; rendered once at root. No text — safe.

items.name: GlassCard
items.notes: Generic glass container. Put readable text on overlay twin, not the card's useEntrance.

items.name: Logo (ClawShow)
items.notes: ClawShow 'Convergence' brand mark PNG — replace for other brands.

items.name: StableSceneFrame
bestFor: splitting camera stage (transform) from static overlay (readable UI at scale 1)
items.notes: THE anti-shimmer mechanism (L50-55): stage gets translate+scale, overlay bare. Readable text → overlay.

items.name: useSnapEntrance (snap.ts)
bestFor: opacity + integer-pixel Y entrances for readable text
items.notes: Shimmer-SAFE: Math.round Y, scale exactly 1 (snap.ts:30).

items.name: useEntrance
items.notes: Shimmer-UNSAFE for text — fractional scale/Y. Use useSnapEntrance for readable UI.

items.name: tokens / theme (mergeBrand)
bestFor: color/type/radius/spacing tokens; mergeBrand to rebrand any scene
items.notes: Brand system for the whole saas-pack; all scene copy is props.

items.notes: LOCAL but needs piper binary + voice model installed (DEPS).
